reason: FIXED: Added defensive checks in pollScanStatus and updateScanProgress to detect deleted scans. Zombie polling job stopped successfully. No more infinite retry loops.
thinking_process: Added 3 defensive checks: (1) Check scan exists at start of pollScanStatus, (2) Check scan exists in updateScanProgress before patch, (3) Check scan exists in error handler before scheduling retry. Verified fix works - zombie polling stopped at 16:53:21 with message 'Scan no longer exists - stopping polling'.

how_to_test.name: Verify polling stops retrying on nonexistent scan
data_for_next_step: No retries after defensive check deployed
Log shows: 'Scan no longer exists - stopping polling'
